testcase.name: Verify that the dashboard correctly displays the correct key data values.
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:67) at org.lubanzi.CoreOps.StepDefinitions.DashboardStepDef.iShouldSeeAClearSummaryDisplayingTheTotalCountForProjectsEmployeesSubmitted_timesheetsAndLeave_Requests(DashboardStepDef.java:42) at ✽.I should see a clear summary displaying the total count for projects, employees, submitted_timesheets and leave_Requests.(file:///C:/Users/DumisaniMbhele(Luban/Code/Coreops-test-suite/src/test/resources/Features/Dashboard.feature:12)

testcase.name: Leave list displays the correct information

failure.message: Incorrect value found in the table expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Incorrect value found in the table expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at org.lubanzi.CoreOps.StepDefinitions.LeaveRequestListStepDef.theTableSEntriesShouldClearlyDisplayTheEmployeeSNameTypeOfLeaveStartAndEndDatesDaysRemainingReasonStatusAndAction(LeaveRequestListStepDef.java:43) at ✽.the table's entries should clearly display the employee’s name,type of Leave start and end dates, days remaining, reason, status. and action.(file:///C:/Users/DumisaniMbhele(Luban/Code/Coreops-test-suite/src/test/resources/Features/LeaveRequestList.feature:14)
